titleStmt.title: SII 8.255: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 255. (A.R. No. 650 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4vatu rājentra coḻavaḷanā
ṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu brahmadeśam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻaccaturvvedi maṅkalaṅ kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟumutal samva
tsara grāma kāriyañ celuttukiṟa kūṭṭapperumakkaḷ Eḻuttu Iṉṉāṭṭut tirukkaḷaruṭaiyār koyilil tānattār
kaṇṭu Iṉṉāyanār koyilil karuṇākarantirumaṇṭapattuk kiḻaittiruvācal tenpakkam Eḻuntaruḷiirukkum muvā
yiraviṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku 4- lāvatu mutal Ūṟki ḻiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa Eṅkaḷuṟ piṭākait tirucciṟṟampalanal
lūr śrībhūmi vatikku kiḻakku rājādhirāja vāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālān tuṇṭattu vaṭakka
ṭaiya nilam muṉṟumā nikki Itan teṟku nāṅkaḷ nirvārtta nilam Iraṇṭumā Innilam Iraṇṭumāvāl vanta maṭa
kku Ūrile Eṟaṭṭu pokakkaṭavomākavum Innilattāl vanta maṭakkukku Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Ūrmā vinta kaṭa
maiyile Antarāyattukku Ivvūril tevarkaḷ civanāmattu Eḻutina nilaṅkaḷ Antarāyam Iṟuttapaṭi Iṟuttu Al
lātatu piḷḷaiyāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku Uṭalāvatākavum Innilam Ivvāṇṭumutal kaikkoṇṭu Inta ni
yokappaṭi kal veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom [..]
Digital edition of SII 8.255 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
